sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58381" key="koinaniko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοιν-ᾱνικός</orth>, <sense id="n58381.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κοινωνικός</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archyt.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.48.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
